page: Google Cloud Platform c4d-highmem-192-lssd is an x86_64 architecture server instance within the c4d family. It features 192 dedicated vCPUs and 1512.0 GB of system memory, yielding approximately 7.88 GB of RAM per core. The instance operates without a dedicated GPU. While the basic description notes the inclusion of 16 local SSDs, the specific local storage capacity is listed as none in the configuration details.

This instance is designed for memory-intensive workloads that require substantial parallel processing capabilities. The high resource density of 192 dedicated vCPUs combined with over 1.5 TB of RAM provides a qualitative cost-efficiency advantage for large-scale enterprise applications by reducing the need to distribute workloads across multiple smaller nodes. Its hardware profile suggests suitability for large-scale databases, in-memory analytics, enterprise resource planning systems, and heavy ETL processing pipelines.
description: Google Cloud Platform c4d-highmem-192-lssd is an x86_64 architecture server designed for memory-intensive enterprise workloads. It features 192 dedicated vCPUs and 1512.0 GB of RAM, providing a high resource density of approximately 7.88 GB of memory per core. The server does not include a GPU. Although the configuration lists local storage size as none, the basic description indicates the presence of 16 local SSDs. This hardware profile offers qualitative cost efficiency for large-scale deployments by consolidating massive memory and compute requirements into a single node, minimizing inter-node latency. The server is optimized for workloads such as large-scale databases, in-memory data processing, heavy ETL pipelines, and enterprise-grade applications requiring substantial memory and parallel processing power.
og_description: Google Cloud Platform c4d-highmem-192-lssd is an x86_64 server featuring 192 dedicated vCPUs, 1512 GB RAM, and 16 local SSDs, optimized for memory-intensive enterprise workloads and databases.
meta_description: Google Cloud Platform c4d-highmem-192-lssd is an x86_64 server with 192 dedicated vCPUs and 1512 GB RAM, built for memory-intensive workloads.
tagline: A high-density memory-optimized instance featuring one hundred ninety-two dedicated cores and over one point five terabytes of system memory.
bullet_points: 1512.0 GB of system memory providing 7.88 GB per core
Configured with 16 local SSDs for high-speed local storage
Suited for large-scale databases and in-memory analytics
